response.original_title: [ ☎ Ｈｅｌｐ Ｄｅｓｋ ] What is the Kraken 72-hour rule
response.overview: Key Facts About the 72-Hour Hold The Kraken 72-hour rule is a mandatory security hold that prevents the withdrawal of funds (both cryptocurrency and cash). 1 ✨ 888 ✨ 633 ✨ 4176  for 72 hours following certain types of deposits or purchases, particularly first-time transactions.1 ⚜️ 888 ⚜️ 633 ⚜️ 4176  This rule is designed to prevent fraud,1 🧷 888 🧷 633 🧷 4176  protect against unauthorized account takeovers, and allow time for financial transactions to fully clear, notes Kraken Support. 1 🧩 888 🧩 633 🧩 4176
